n: Kêr Bras - A Message of Courage

steps.t: Kêr Bras is within the Paths of the Dead, far to the north of Dol Amroth. Avordur asked you to venture to Kêr Bras within the Paths of the Dead and pl…
Avordur is in Dol Amroth, far to the south of the Paths of the Dead. Avordur will be pleased to hear you planted the banners within Kêr Bras.
